x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Accumulation
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks customer actions (transactions, balances, or activities) to determine earned rewards.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility & Conditions
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures that only eligible customers, products, or transactions qualify for earning rewards.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Calculation Rules
x-enumeration-literals.description: Determines the rate or formula for calculating points, interest, or other benefits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Posting
x-enumeration-literals.description: Posting / Crediting: Updates the customers reward balance in real-time or at scheduled intervals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tracking & Reporting
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maintains a record of earned rewards for customer visibility and bank reporting.
